title: Misteri di Lapak Bumbu
theme: Menyelami intrik kecil yang tersembunyi di balik rutinitas pasar, menemukan bahwa setiap sudut punya rahasia unik dan seringkali kocak untuk dipecahkan.

cover.prompt: Cinematic photograph capturing the vibrant yet precise atmosphere of an Indonesian traditional spice market at dawn. Focus on a vendor's stall, featuring carefully arranged, colorful mounds of dry spices: turmeric powder, whole coriander seeds, and peppercorns. Sunlight gently breaks through, casting warm, diffused light and highlighting the textures of the spices. The scene evokes the feeling of a day slowly unfolding into building heat and a sense of quiet, practiced routine. Composition employs the rule of thirds, with a shallow depth of field, drawing attention to the meticulous arrangement of the spices. The overall aesthetic is one of serene, practiced activity amidst the market's awakening. Warm color grading and a soft, inviting atmosphere.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A cynical spice vendor observes strange occurrences at a neighboring vegetable stall, initially dismissing them but eventually turning into an amateur detective. After humorous observations and wild theories, he uncovers a mundane and comical truth behind the mystery, leaving him with a renewed, albeit more cynical, appreciation for the absurdities of daily market life.
